          (begin

diary_entries.entry: Another year. Small meteorite impacts near colony. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.
Year 40 on Mars. Small meteorite impacts near colony. Morale is hopeful. We have 961 food units left.
Population: 24. Small meteorite impacts near colony. I spent the year on prayer. Closest to Vulcan.

meta_awareness: Ares (year 40): 'Our constitution is just code. Our resources are just numbers. What if everything outside this dome is also just numbers?'
